content.en:
"Reaching the 6th life level is the minimum requirement, because only when the half-step Sixfold Ancestor realm reaches the 6th life level, can the eighty-one boundaries be easily broken. “

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Of course, the half-step sevenfold ancestor who broke the eighty-one boundaries did not necessarily reach the 6 life level, and it was also possible that he had used an incomparably rare and terrifying number of treasures.

For example, even if Ye Tian didn't reach the 6th life level, he could still break through the eighty-one boundaries with the help of the wind scales of the Sevenfold Ancestor.

However, with the improvement of the life level, it is extremely easy to break the eighty-one boundary, and there will be no bottleneck at all, even if you use ordinary resources to assist in cultivation, you can still break the eighty-first boundary.

This is one of the benefits of life level ascension!

In addition, the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor's life level is raised above 6, and if you break through to the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor in the future, you will condense the Life Dao Flower!

The Life Dao Flower is something that can only be condensed after the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor's life level reaches 6, while the ordinary Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor does not have a Life Dao Flower.

And the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor comprehends the Limit Yuan Dao, and after breaking through to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, he will condense the Yuan Dao Dao Flower.

Life Dao Flower, Yuan Dao Dao Flower, these two Dao Flowers are the key to becoming the Ninefold Ancestor.

If you only have the Yuan Dao Dao Flower, you won't be able to become a Ninefold Ancestor in the future.

If the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor misses the opportunity to condense the Life Dao Flower, then if he wants to break through to the Ninefold Origin Ancestor in the future, he will only be reincarnated and rebuilt.

However, if you really reach the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, it will be very difficult to reincarnate and recultivate!

Like the Reincarnation Arcana made of the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, there is no way to reincarnate the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor Reincarnation, and it needs a more powerful Reincarnation Arcana, so it will be difficult to do!

Besides, if you are really reincarnated and recultivated, you can really raise your life level to above 6 in the half-step sevenfold ancestor realm!

Besides, I don't know how many Dao Ancestors have fallen due to reincarnation and recultivation, the danger is too great, and there are not many Dao Ancestors who can rise after real reincarnation and recultivation.

"Only by condensing the Life Dao Flower can we hope to become a Ninefold Origin Ancestor in the future! That is to say, those Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai Region Boundary can only break through to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor at most in the future, and they will have no chance with the Ninefold Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And there is a difference between the Dao Flower of Life, just like the difference between the Dao Flower of the Yuan Dao.

For example, the half-step eightfold ancestor who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, once he broke through, the condensed Yuan Dao Dao Flower was the Ninefold Yuan Dao Dao Flower.

In the same way, the Life Dao Flower is also divided into the Sixfold Life Dao Flower, the Sevenfold Life Dao Flower, the Eightfold Life Dao Flower, and the Ninefold Life Dao Flower.

Among them, the Ninefold Life Dao Flower is the highest level of Life Dao Flower.

Like Ye Tian's current life level, which is only 6.5, it means that he can only condense the sixfold life Dao flower.

If he wanted to condense the Ninefold Life Dao Flower, he had to raise the life level above 9.

"It's too difficult to raise the life level to 9!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, it was extremely difficult for so many Dao Ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao to raise their life level above 6.

For example, the half-step sevenfold ancestor who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao in the Hanhai District Realm alone raised the life level above 6, and the life level of the other half-step sevenfold ancestors was still many, much worse than the 6 life level.

It's so difficult to raise your life level to 6, let alone raise your life level above 9.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian also learned how to join the Xuanlou of the Nine-Story Building and become a member of the Xuanlou.

Becoming an Eightfold Ancestor is still far away for him, so he can only pass the assessment requirements of Xuanlou.

And Xuanlou's requirement is to raise the life level above 8 in the half-step sevenfold ancestral realm, and complete a Xuanlou task.

In this way, you can join the Xuanlou and become a member of the Xuanlou.

"I'm not in a hurry to join the Xuanlou, I can be in the Hanhai Yellow Building at the moment!"

Ye Tian had just joined the Nine-Story Building, so he naturally had a lot of resources as a reward, but his current cultivation could not be improved, so these resources were not needed for the time being.

"Let's break the eighty-first boundary first, the life level has not been raised to above 6 before, and it takes countless wind scales to hope for a breakthrough, and now it should be easy to break the boundary!"

So, Ye Tian took out some wind scales and began refining again.

This time, Ye Tian clearly felt that the auxiliary effect of the wind scales on himself was completely unimaginable in the past!

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to sense the existence of the eighty-first boundary.

"Broken!"

Without any bottleneck, the eighty-first boundary was easily broken by Ye Tian.

At this point, Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the limit of a half-step sevenfold ancestor.

"Huh, I didn't expect to break through so easily, I thought it would take a large number of Sevenfold Ancestor Wind Scales to break through!"

Now, his cultivation cannot be improved for the time being, although he can impact the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm, but he knows the existence of the Life Dao Flower from the knowledge secrets given by the Nine-Fold Building, so he naturally will not easily impact the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

Maybe the ultimate goal of other Dao Ancestors is only the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, but his goal is not the Eightfold Origin Ancestor!

"Since the highest Life Dao Flower is the Ninefold Life Dao Flower, then I will raise the life level to 9 as much as possible in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

If he hadn't joined the Nine-Story Building, it would have been impossible for him to raise his life level to 9 just by relying on the resources of the Hanhai District Boundary.

Moreover, the ancient river of life is no longer of use to him, and he has to find other opportunities.

And through the information given by Hanhai Huanglou, he learned about some treasures that could improve his life level.

After some selection, Ye Tian finally had a choice.

"Hanhai Wind Belt, Life Elf!"

The Life Spirit is a kind of primordial antiquity in the Hanhai Wind Belt, which is very rare, but its strength is not weak, and the weakest ones have the realm of half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors, which are powerful enough to be comparable to sevenfold primordial ancestors or even half-step eightfold primordial ancestors.

And once the life spirit is killed, a material will appear - the life source bead, which can improve the life level.

However, once you absorb and refine more, it will not be of much use!

Among the nine-story buildings, there are also official members who purchase the Life Source Pearl, which can be said to be of high value, and almost no Dao Ancestors are willing to sell them.

If Ye Tian wanted to obtain the Life Source Bead, he could only rely on himself to find the Life Spirit.

For the other members of the Yellow House of the Nine-Story Building, finding the Life Source Bead is undoubtedly the most difficult way, in fact, there are many treasures under the command of the Nine-Story Building, and many of them can improve the level of life, but the improvement is not large, and it also requires points.

And these points cannot be exchanged for resources, and can only take the tasks assigned by the nine-story building.

Taking those tasks, exchanging points, and going to those treasure places is undoubtedly a great waste of time.

For Ye Tian, it is better to go to the Hanhai Wind Belt to find the life elves, this is the most suitable way for him.

Wait for the Life Source Bead to have a bad effect on him, and then go to take the task in exchange for points.
